data.title: The 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid spent 3.7 million USDC to buy 1961 ETH 20 minutes ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa’s monitoring, the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid continued to increase its $ETH spot position after closing its position. 20 minutes ago, it spent 3.7 million USDC to buy 1,961 ETH. In the past three days, the cumulative number of ETH purchased increased to 7,872, with an average cost of $1,961. The current floating loss is $727,000.

data.title: Circle to Integrate Hashnote Tokenized Fund Under Bermuda Regulation
data.description: According to Foresight News, stablecoin issuer Circle plans to incorporate its recently acquired Hashnote tokenized money market fund under Bermuda's regulatory framework. This move will align the fund with Circle's existing Digital Assets Business Act (DABA) license. Data from rwa.xyz indicates that Hashnote has issued one of the largest tokenized money market funds, USYC, which manages nearly $1 billion in assets.

data.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Ratings for Bitcoin Mining Companies
data.description: According to Odaily, JPMorgan has revised its ratings for several Bitcoin mining companies. The financial institution upgraded the rating of Bitcoin mining firm IREN from 'neutral' to 'overweight.' Conversely, Cipher Mining's rating was downgraded from 'overweight' to 'neutral.' Additionally, JPMorgan maintained an 'overweight' rating for Riot Platforms and CleanSpark, while MARA Holdings received a 'neutral' rating.

data.title: BTC briefly fell below 82,000 USDT, and the 24-hour increase narrowed to 1.23%
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC briefly fell below 82,000 USDT and is now at 81,978.1 USDT, with the 24-hour increase narrowed to 1.23%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 82,000 USDT with a 1.35% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 13, 2025, 13:53 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 82,000 USDT and is now trading at 81,976 USDT, with a narrowed 1.35% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase rates most Bitcoin mining companies “neutral” and raises IREN’s rating to overweight
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: JPMorgan Chase raised the rating of Bitcoin mining company IREN from "neutral" to "overweight", and downgraded Cipher Mining from "overweight" to "neutral". In addition, the overweight ratings for Riot Platforms and CleanSpark and the rating for MARA Holdings are all "neutral". (Coindesk)

data.title: The 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid has made a profit of more than 11.198 million US dollars in the past 10 days, with a winning rate of 100%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid has closed all its positions in Hyperliquid and GMX. This is the sixth leverage of the whale since March 2, and it still maintains a 100% winning rate, with a profit of more than 11.198 million US dollars in ten days.

data.title: Bitcoin Price to Faces $70K Retest Before Next Rally?
data.description:
Bitcoin price rally faces resistance as analysts point to a possible retest of $70,000 before the next leg up. Former BitMEX CEO Arthur Hayes expects short-term volatility, urging investors to remain patient. Meanwhile, on-chain data shows that whales have been accumulating, suggesting a potential rebound. BTC has struggled to maintain momentum after hitting a four-month low […]

source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/13/bitcoin-price-to-faces-70k-retest-before-next-rally/
